# Portfolio Development Guidelines

## Clarify Project Requirements
- ✅ Portfolio website for Sawaira Mughal
- ✅ Full-stack developer profile
- ✅ Showcase skills, projects, and experience
- ✅ Simple and effective design

## Scaffold the Project
- ✅ Created Vite + React + Tailwind CSS project
- ✅ Set up all configuration files
- ✅ Structured components for modularity

## Customize the Project
- ✅ Created 11 React components for different sections
- ✅ Integrated all resume information
- ✅ Tailored styling with Tailwind CSS
- ✅ Added interactive elements and navigation

## Install Required Extensions
- ✅ No additional VS Code extensions required
- ✅ Project ready with default tools

## Compile the Project
- ⏳ Ready for npm install and npm run dev

## Create and Run Task
- ⏳ Ready for development server

## Launch the Project
- ⏳ Ready after dependencies installation

## Ensure Documentation is Complete
- ✅ README.md created with comprehensive documentation
- ✅ Project structure clearly documented
- ✅ Installation and usage instructions provided
